# Maple Farm

> Maple Farm is a private farmhouse rental in Nishikagura, Asahikawa, Hokkaido, Japan — 5 minutes by car from Asahikawa Airport (AKJ), a 20-minute walk from Chiyogaoka Station on the JR Furano Line, and 35-40 minutes by car from Biei's Blue Pond. Sleeps 6 in 3 bedrooms with a full kitchen, washer-dryer, and free parking.

Key facts:

- Location: Nishikagura, Asahikawa, Hokkaido, Japan (5 min drive from Asahikawa Airport; 20 min walk to Chiyogaoka Station on the JR Furano Line; close to Higashikawa and Biei)
- Sleeps 6 · 3 bedrooms · 1 bathroom + separate toilet · 2 washbasins
- Full kitchen and appliances, washer-dryer, free on-site parking
- Check-in 16:00 · check-out 10:00
- Wood stove available in winter for an additional ¥10,000 per stay (usage guidelines apply)
- Contact: info@maple-farm.com
- Guest ratings: 8.2/10 "Very Good" on Booking.com (38 reviews) · 4.74/5 on Airbnb (39 reviews)

Nearby attractions: Blue Pond (35-40 min), Asahiyama Zoo (20 min), Shikisai Hill flower fields (20 min), Patchwork Road, Furano (1 h). Hot springs: Kitoron (15 min), Mori no Yu Hanakagura (20 min), Shirogane Onsen (35-40 min). Ski resorts: Canmore Ski Village (20 min), Kamui Ski Links (40 min), Asahidake (45 min).

Best seasons: July-August for lavender and flower fields; December-February for powder snow, skiing, and the Blue Pond illuminations.

- [Availability calendar and booking options](https://www.maple-farm.com/#section3)

- [Airbnb listing](https://www.airbnb.com/l/GdMSJ1db)
